body.title: announce/envelope.py — IdentityEnvelope dataclass
body.result: IdentityEnvelope dataclass at announce/envelope.py. Mandatory fields validated on from_dict(); suffix-style address helpers (primary_mailbox, surface_mailbox, coa_mailbox); for_this_process() convenience factory. agent_datacenter commit 12eb6f8.
body.description:
Define IdentityEnvelope — the wire shape an agent sends when plugging in. Per design doc § 3.1: agent_id, instance_n, lineage (metadata only), surface_address, ts. No identity-proof field for v1 (localhost-uid trust per § 14 decision 8).

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/announce/__init__.py (NEW), /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/announce/envelope.py (NEW)
**Design rules:** dataclass-as-wire-shape, frozen=True for immutability
**Scope boundary:** in — IdentityEnvelope dataclass, validation (required fields), to_dict/from_dict serialization; out — identity proofs (deferred to Phase 5+), envelope routing logic (broker handles)
**Test plan:** test_envelope_validates_required_fields, test_envelope_to_dict_roundtrips, test_envelope_rejects_missing_agent_id
